commit.message: update Check evaluation results
update python version
Refactor RAG evaluation workflow to improve output formatting in GitHub summary by consolidating echo commands into a single block.
Update RAG evaluation workflow to use 'sed' for extracting results, improving output formatting in GitHub summary.
Refine AI prompt in chat controller to clarify numeric response rules, including unit retention, strict output format, and example response structure for improved accuracy and consistency.
Refine AI prompt in chat controller to enhance numeric response accuracy by specifying rules for single values, uncertainty removal, and summation of totals.
Ensure minimum passage count in chat controller by adjusting topK parameter and refine AI prompt instructions for numeric value citation.
Adjust temperature parameter in chat controller's AI response generation to improve response quality and consistency.
Refine AI prompt in chat controller by removing instruction to avoid revealing reasoning, promoting a more straightforward response approach.
Refactor AI response generation in chat controller by simplifying the prompt structure to focus on concise answers without revealing reasoning, enhancing clarity and efficiency.

Enhance AI response generation in chat controller by restructuring prompt format to include key point extraction and answer construction steps, and adjusting parameters for temperature and max tokens.
Remove commented-out PR comment logic from RAG evaluation workflow to streamline the script.
Add GitHub Actions workflow for RAG evaluation, including steps for setup, dependency installation, evaluation execution, result checking, and PR commenting.

readme_html:
Supavec - The open-source alternative to Carbon.ai. Build powerful RAG applications with any data source, at any scale.

⚡ OSS RAG-as-a-Service — spin up vector search + chat API in <5 min
📈 630▲ on Product Hunt · 620⭐ on GitHub

Cloud version

https://www.supavec.com

Our simple API endpoints ✨

docs.supavec.com.

Related repositories

  • taishikato/supavec-python-api

Built with

  • Next.js
  • Supabase
  • Tailwind CSS
  • Bun
  • Upstash

API docs

https://github.com/taishikato/supavec/blob/main/packages/api/README.md

Architecture & Design Philosophy

Scalable Multi-Tenant Design

  • Row-Level Security (RLS) for team-level data isolation
  • Usage‑based billing: Free 100 → Basic 750 → Ent 5000 req/mo
  • Batch embeddings: OpenAI cost -65 %

Vector Search Optimisation

  • Configurable chunk & overlap (+12 pts recall)
  • Hybrid filter (file_id + cosine) P95 210 ms

Performance & Observability

Real‑time Analytics

  • PostHog integration product & API events tracked (11 schema)
  • Request‑level tracing with unique IDs for rapid debugging
  • Async usage logging non‑blocking main flow

API Performance

  • Streaming or standard responses selectable per request
  • 100‑doc batch embedding reduces latency + cost
  • Background processing keeps critical path lean
// Example: choose streaming or standard chat responses
const response = await fetch('/chat', {
  method: 'POST',
  body: JSON.stringify({
    query: 'What is this document about?',
    file_ids: ['uuid-here'],
    stream: true // set false for JSON
  })
});

Developer Experience

  • Visual debugging: live embedding preview in chat UI
  • Progressive disclosure: guided onboarding & contextual states
  • API-first design: REST endpoints + comprehensive errors
  • Redis-backed rate limiting: sliding-window strategy

Getting Started

Install dependencies

bun i

Run the development server

bun dev

Run the web server

cd apps/web && bun run dev

Run the API server

cd packages/api && bun run dev
